channel.title: Data Science Portfolio on Abdellahi El Moustapha

item.title: Project 1: Access to Public Health
item.description: A study on access of Public Health In Mauritania.

item.title: Project 2: ESP GRADES APP
item.description: A web app that displays the grades of students in the department of Data Science in ESP.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Follow me on these social media platforms: Platform URL YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8r6Wor8s3ffSJdFcse4zog Website: https://alkanash.wordpress.com/ Twitter: https://twitter.com/AbdellahiMou1 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abdellahi-el-moustapha/ GitHub: https://github.com/Abmstpha
